history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. A safe path to the goal at row 04 column D is to go down through row 03. To do that, I should first face downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, and moving there progresses toward a route around the lava to reach the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe floor. Moving there keeps me on a safe path that can approach the goal while avoiding the lava at row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is a wall, so I should not move forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, but row 04 column C is lava, so I need to reorient to backtrack and approach the goal from another safe path. Turning left will face me rightward? From down, turning left faces right, which would point toward lava, so instead I should turn right to face left, preparing to turn around safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left. The cell ahead at row 04 column A is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To backtrack safely, I should turn right to face up toward row 03 column B, which is an open floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is open floor, and moving there is the safe route to go around the lava at row 04 column C and approach the goal from above.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 02 column B is open floor, so moving forward is safe and helps me continue around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 01 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To head toward the goal at row 04 column D, I should turn right to face the open path through row 02 column D.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. I should turn right to face down toward the safe path through row 03 column B.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is floor and is safe. Moving forward advances me toward the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is floor and safe. Moving forward keeps me on the safe route toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is a wall, so I should not move forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, so I need to reorient toward the right. From facing down, turning left will make me face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. I need to avoid the lava and take a different route, so I should turn left to face up toward the safe cell at row 03 column B.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, and moving there helps me go around the lava at row 04 column C toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 02 column B is safe floor, and moving there positions me to go right across the top row of the open area toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
